enchantment.nights_mediumcore.life_leech: Each level heals 3% of damage dealt to players. Max level 3.
Each level heals 3% of damage dealt to players. Max level 3.
enchantment.nights_mediumcore.life_steal: Each level heals 3% of damage dealt to hostile mobs. Max level 3.
Each level heals 3% of damage dealt to hostile mobs. Max level 3.
Each level gives a 0.1% chance for hostile mobs to drop a Living Heart on kill. Max level 3.
Each level gives a 0.1% chance for hostile mobs to drop a Living Heart on kill. Max level 3.
item.nights_mediumcore.living_heart.tool: Right-click to permanently gain a lifesteal heart. Drops on death if mediumcore is enabled.
item.nights_mediumcore.crystal_heart.too: Right-click to restore one lost mediumcore heart. Has a cooldown and cannot be used in combat.
item.nights_mediumcore.supreme_crystal_h: Right-click to restore all lost mediumcore hearts. No cooldown.
item.nights_mediumcore.blood_relic.toolt: Upgraded Heart Relic. Gives bonus hearts, Regen 1, and a chance for mobs to drop Living Hearts.
item.nights_mediumcore.vampiric_scythe.t: Heals on hit and gives a chance for mobs to drop Living Hearts on kill.
advancements.nights_mediumcore.root.desc: A harder path through the night.
advancements.nights_mediumcore.full_heal: Reach 40 max HP (20 hearts) — the lifesteal maximum.
